description: Linear-fit + residuals-vs-fitted linearity diagnostic for two numeric CSV columns (+ figure).
rules: read-only — input CSV is never mutated
fits a simple OLS line of Y on X via scipy.stats.linregress
reports slope, intercept, r, r-squared, p-value, std_err
JSON report + PNG figure (scatter+fit and residuals-vs-fitted) written to record_store
usage: Set DATA_CSV, X_COL (predictor), Y_COL (outcome). Output: linearity.json + linearity.png.
limitation: Single predictor (bivariate) only; rows with NaN in either column are dropped. Requires numpy/scipy/pandas/matplotlib present; degrades to an empty report otherwise.
